mapper.select:
SELECT /* BondMgmtMapper.selectSoldAssetList2Ex */ B.CONTRACT_NUM , B.SUB_LINK_NAME , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP001', B.CUSTOMER_TYPE) AS CUSTOMER_TYPE , DECODE(B.CUSTOMER_TYPE, 'I', SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(B.USER_SSN),0,6), '') AS USER_SSN , B.TAX_ID , FN_GET_ORGNM(B.OPEN_AGNT_CD) AS ORGN_NM , B.SUB_ADR_PRIMARY_LN , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO , TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(B.INST_STRT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 1), 'YYYY-MM')||'-01' AS PAY_STRT_DT , TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(B.INSR_TRMN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 1)), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PAY_END_DT , '매월말일' AS REDEEM_DT , F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO', 'BL_BILLING_METHOD', B.BL_BILLING_METHOD) AS BL_BILLING_METHOD , B.TTL_INST_AMNT , 0 AS INST_INT_AMT , 0 AS INST_ETC_AMT , B.TTL_INST_AMNT + 0 + 0 AS INST_TOTAL_AMT , (SELECT YET_PYMN_AMNT FROM MSP_BOND_ASSET WHERE GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(A.SALE_YM,'YYYYMM'),-1),'YYYYMM') AND A.RTN_YM IS NULL ) AS BOND_SALE_AMT , 0 AS BOND_SALE_INT_AMT , 0 AS BOND_SALE_ETC_AMT , (SELECT YET_PYMN_AMNT FROM MSP_BOND_ASSET WHERE GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(A.SALE_YM,'YYYYMM'),-1),'YYYYMM') AND A.RTN_YM IS NULL ) + 0 + 0 AS BOND_SALE_TOTAL_AMT , B.YET_PYMN_AMNT , TRUNC(B.TTL_INST_AMNT/B.TTL_INST_MNTH_CNT,-1) AS MON_BILL , B.TTL_INST_MNTH_CNT , B.RMN_INST_CNT , B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO , A.BOND_SEQ_NO FROM MSP_BOND_SALE_DTL A , MSP_BOND_ASSET B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND A.BOND_SEQ_NO = #{bondSeqNo} AND A.RTN_YM IS NULL AND B.MST_YN = 'Y'
ORDER BY B.OPEN_DT DESC

SELECT /* BondSaleMapper.selectSoldReceiptByMonth */ '1' AS OD, '합계' AS GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO, SUM(A.YET_PYMN_AMNT + A.REAL_PYMN_AMNT + A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT + A.GRNT_INSR_AMNT + A.ADJS_AMNT) AS PRV_YET_PYMN_AMNT, NULL AS INST_CNT, SUM(A.BILL_AMNT) AS BILL_AMNT, SUM(A.PYMN_AMNT) AS PYMN_AMNT, SUM(A.UNPAY_AMNT) AS UNPAY_AMNT, SUM(CASE WHEN A.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT - B.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT > 0 THEN A.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT - B.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT ELSE 0 END) AS TO_UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT, SUM(A.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT) AS UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT, NULL AS UNPAY_ARRS_TMSCNT, SUM(CASE WHEN A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT > 0 AND A.YET_PYMN_AMNT = 0 THEN A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT ELSE 0 END) AS FULL_PRFPAY_AMNT, SUM(CASE WHEN A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT > 0 AND A.YET_PYMN_AMNT > 0 THEN A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT ELSE 0 END) AS MID_PRFPAY_AMNT, SUM(A.GRNT_INSR_AMNT) AS GRNT_INSR_AMNT, SUM(A.ADJS_AMNT) AS ADJS_AMNT, SUM(CASE WHEN A.UNPAY_ARRS_FEE_AMNT - B.UNPAY_ARRS_FEE_AMNT + B.ARRS_FEE_AMNT > 0 THEN A.UNPAY_ARRS_FEE_AMNT - B.UNPAY_ARRS_FEE_AMNT + B.ARRS_FEE_AMNT ELSE 0 END) AS ARRS_FEE_INV_AMNT, SUM(A.ARRS_FEE_AMNT) AS ARRS_FEE_AMNT, SUM(B.YET_PYMN_AMNT - A.YET_PYMN_AMNT) AS DSC_AMNT, SUM(A.REAL_PYMN_AMNT + A.GRNT_INSR_AMNT + A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT + A.ADJS_AMNT + A.ARRS_FEE_AMNT) AS REAL_PYMN_AMNT, SUM(A.YET_PYMN_AMNT) AS YET_PYMN_AMNT FROM MSP_BOND_ASSET A, MSP_BOND_ASSET B, MSP_BOND_SALE_DTL C WHERE 1 = 1 AND C.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO -- AND A.BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(B.BILL_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 1), 'YYYYMM') AND B.BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{billYm}, 'YYYYMM'), -1), 'YYYYMM') AND C.BOND_SEQ_NO = #{bondSeqNo} AND A.BILL_YM = #{billYm} UNION ALL SELECT '2' AS OD, A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO, A.YET_PYMN_AMNT + A.REAL_PYMN_AMNT + A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT + A.GRNT_INSR_AMNT + A.ADJS_AMNT AS PRV_YET_PYMN_AMNT, CASE WHEN A.TTL_INST_MNTH_CNT - A.RMN_INST_CNT > 0 THEN ABS(A.TTL_INST_MNTH_CNT - A.RMN_INST_CNT) ELSE 0 END AS INST_CNT, A.BILL_AMNT, A.PYMN_AMNT, A.UNPAY_AMNT, CASE WHEN A.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT - B.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT > 0 THEN A.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT - B.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT ELSE 0 END AS TO_UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT, A.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT, A.UNPAY_ARRS_TMSCNT, CASE WHEN A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT > 0 AND A.YET_PYMN_AMNT = 0 THEN A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT ELSE 0 END AS FULL_PRFPAY_AMNT, CASE WHEN A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT > 0 AND A.YET_PYMN_AMNT > 0 THEN A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT ELSE 0 END AS MID_PRFPAY_AMNT, A.GRNT_INSR_AMNT, A.ADJS_AMNT, CASE WHEN A.UNPAY_ARRS_FEE_AMNT - B.UNPAY_ARRS_FEE_AMNT + B.ARRS_FEE_AMNT > 0 THEN A.UNPAY_ARRS_FEE_AMNT - B.UNPAY_ARRS_FEE_AMNT + B.ARRS_FEE_AMNT ELSE 0 END AS ARRS_FEE_INV_AMNT, A.ARRS_FEE_AMNT, B.YET_PYMN_AMNT - A.YET_PYMN_AMNT AS DSC_AMNT, A.REAL_PYMN_AMNT + A.GRNT_INSR_AMNT + A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT + A.ADJS_AMNT + A.ARRS_FEE_AMNT AS REAL_PYMN_AMNT, A.YET_PYMN_AMNT FROM MSP_BOND_ASSET A, MSP_BOND_ASSET B, MSP_BOND_SALE_DTL C WHERE 1 = 1 AND C.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO -- AND A.BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(B.BILL_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 1), 'YYYYMM') AND B.BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{billYm}, 'YYYYMM'), -1), 'YYYYMM') AND C.BOND_SEQ_NO = #{bondSeqNo} AND A.BILL_YM = #{billYm} ORDER BY OD
